chunks.text: My father brought home a small puppy.
Mother decided to adopt her, and we named her Sora.
Father declared her a member of our family, and we all welcomed her.
Mother considered her a gentle creature.
I trusted her as a good companion.
Within a few days, she began to feel that our house belonged to her too.
Father said, " Let us accept this dog as family," and we embraced her together.
After a few weeks, the family had made her a content and calm dog.
Sora became the curious affection of our home
and she carried a warm bond into every heart.
